_comment: Day 5 X mirror queue entry — European precedent / Digital Rights Ireland. Anchor on CJEU 2014 ruling.
matchSubstring: In 2014, the European Court of Justice struck down
text:
In 2014, the European Court of Justice struck down the EU's mandatory metadata-retention directive.

Same data category. Comparable retention duration. The Court called it a "particularly serious" rights interference.

Canada is now proposing a similar scheme.
